docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SANTILLI, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANMADE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED AUG-28-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUMANMADE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JASPER THOMAS/JODY ROANE FILED BY DEFENDANT HUMANMADE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SEBASTIAN SANTILLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JASPER THOMAS & JODY ROANE HUMANMADE ARE PRESENT APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTILLI, SEBASTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUMANMADE $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.00, $1200.00 = MEMBERSHIP FEE ($200.00) X SIX MONTHS IN LIEU OF NOTICE OF CANCELLATION OF MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
